name: announcement-bar
description: A slim, full-width bar above the header carrying a short message and an optional link — a launch, a promotion, or a notice.

responsive.base: Message wraps; the link sits beneath it.
responsive.md: Message and link on one centered row.

a11y.landmarkNote: Rendered as a region with an accessible name (e.g. "Announcement").
notes: The bar is above the header; it does not contribute a heading to the page outline.
If the bar is dismissible, the dismiss control has an accessible name and the state persists.
Contrast of the message and link meets 4.5:1 on the bar surface.

elementor.notes: A full-width container above the header; typically on an accent or accent-subtle background.
